dashboard.monthlyQuotaDesc: AI conversations included in your plan.

errors.invalidTime: End time must be after start time

staff.title: Staff
staff.passwordHint: Staff will use this password to sign in (min. 6 characters)
staff.phoneHint: WhatsApp number for support ticket notifications
staff.resetPasswordDesc: Set a new login password for this staff member.
staff.roleHintNormal: Can access messages and account settings.
staff.roleHintSuper: Can access messages, account settings, and knowledge base.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Company information used by the AI
knowledge.uploadHint: PDF, Word (.docx), Excel (.xlsx, .xls), Markdown (.md) or text (.txt) — content is read and split into chunks for AI
knowledge.contentPlaceholder: Type text or upload a file above...
knowledge.contentHint: After saving, content is automatically chunked and added to the vector index. In Markdown files, ## headings define chunk boundaries.
knowledge.fileReadError: Could not read the file. Choose a UTF-8 text or Markdown file.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Connection
whatsapp.description: Connect your business line via QR code
whatsapp.multiDesc: Manage all your WhatsApp lines from a single panel
whatsapp.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this WhatsApp line?
whatsapp.linkDepartmentsHint: Select separately for each WhatsApp line. Unselected departments are not routed on that line.
whatsapp.noLinkedDepartments: No departments linked to this line
whatsapp.planLimitHint: Your plan allows up to {{limit}} WhatsApp lines
whatsapp.departmentsDesc: Create departments first, then open each WhatsApp line card to choose which departments it handles
whatsapp.deleteDeptConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this department?
whatsapp.reconnectingDesc: The server restarted or had a brief disconnect. Reconnecting from saved session files — no QR scan needed.
whatsapp.reconnectWithQrHint: If auto-reconnect fails, generate a new QR code and scan again.
whatsapp.connectionQrDesc: Scan QR from your phone to connect quickly.
whatsapp.connectionCloudDesc: Manage your number via official Meta API.
whatsapp.disconnectCloudFirst: Disconnect Cloud API first to connect via QR.
whatsapp.disconnectQrFirst: Disconnect QR connection first to use Cloud API.
whatsapp.accessTokenKeepHint: Re-enter the current token if you are not changing it.
whatsapp.webhookDesc: Meta Developer Console → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook:
whatsapp.webhookHint: Enter WHATSAPP_VERIFY_TOKEN from your server in Meta webhook verification.
whatsapp.howItWorksDesc: Choose QR or Meta Cloud API per line. For Cloud API, configure the webhook settings below in Meta.
whatsapp.phoneNumberIdPlaceholder: Meta Developer → WhatsApp → Phone Number ID

subscription.extraAddonsDesc: When your quota is full, purchase one of the packs below to increase your limit.
subscription.addonPurchaseSuccess: Pack added. New limit: {{limit}} AI conversations
subscription.noAddons: No add-on packs are currently available.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.description: Update your personal information and password.
settings.emailChangeHint: Contact support to change your email.
settings.passwordDesc: Use a strong password for account security
settings.demoPassword: Password cannot be changed in demo mode. You can update it here in production.
settings.passwordMin: New password must be at least 6 characters.
settings.customInstructionsPlaceholder: E.g. Use a formal but warm tone; state prices in TRY.
settings.customInstructionsHint: Tone and presentation preferences only. Safety, knowledge base, and handoff rules cannot be overridden.
settings.staffCompanyHint: Only admin accounts can update company information.
settings.personalPhoneHint: Enter your WhatsApp number to receive notifications.
settings.notificationsDesc: Select who receives a WhatsApp alert when a new support ticket arrives.
settings.notificationsHint: Selected users receive WhatsApp notifications. Users without a phone number can be selected but will not receive alerts.

plans.title: Subscription Plans
plans.description: Edit pricing and limits for Starter, Business, and Enterprise. Changes appear on the customer subscription page.
plans.name: Plan Name
plans.descriptionHint: One-line summary shown at the top of the plan card.
plans.featuresHint: Listed as bullet points. Legacy descriptions with ✅ are parsed automatically.
plans.messageLimitHint: A new conversation is counted every 50 customer messages per person, or after a 12-hour gap
plans.priceYearlyHint: Total yearly amount. Leave empty to hide yearly pricing on the customer panel.
plans.addonsDescription: Edit pricing and conversation counts for add-on packs customers can buy when quota is exhausted.
plans.addonInvalid: Enter a valid name, conversation count, and price.
plans.addonDemoHint: Add-on editing is disabled in demo mode.
plans.activeHint: Show this plan on the customer panel
plans.syncHint: Also update quota limits for companies already on this plan
plans.demoHint: Plan editing is disabled in demo mode. Use a live environment to make changes.

settings.title: Platform Settings
settings.description: System configuration summary — sensitive keys are stored in server .env
settings.envNote: API keys (OpenAI, Supabase, WhatsApp) are changed only via backend .env. Restart the server after changes.
settings.invoiceDesc: Company details shown on PDF invoices. Saved changes apply to newly downloaded invoices immediately.
settings.footerNotePlaceholder: Extra text shown at the bottom of the PDF
settings.invoiceSaved: Invoice details saved. New PDFs will use the updated information.

prompts.title: AI Prompts
prompts.description: Manage all prompts used by the WhatsApp assistant. Changes apply to AI processing immediately.
prompts.descriptionNew: Add and edit prompts here. The AI uses active prompts on the next message.
prompts.howItWorks: The system prompt (default: knowledge-base rule) sets core AI behavior. You can add greeting, appointment, language, and translation prompts. Extra (custom) prompts are merged automatically.
prompts.coreHint: Add or edit any role you need. Only the knowledge-base rule is included by default.
prompts.customHint: Extra prompts are appended to the main system. Lower sort order comes first.
prompts.noCustom: No extra prompts yet. Add one to define custom AI rules.
prompts.cleanupConfirm: Extra prompts will be deleted and the system prompt reset to default. Continue?
prompts.deleteConfirm: This prompt will be permanently deleted. Continue?
prompts.roleGreetingDesc: Message sent when customer says hello
prompts.roleSystemDesc: Core AI rules — knowledge base, transfer, security
prompts.roleTranslationDesc: Translate knowledge base text to customer language
prompts.roleCustomDesc: Your custom rules appended to the main system
prompts.name: Name
prompts.variablesHint: These placeholders are filled automatically at runtime.
prompts.resetAllConfirm: All prompts will be reset to knowledge-base-only defaults. Continue?
prompts.saved: Prompt saved — AI will use this version now.
prompts.inactiveWarning: This prompt is inactive. Saving will activate it for AI.
prompts.activeAiPrompt: AI is currently using this prompt
prompts.liveNote: After saving, AI uses this prompt on the next message
prompts.selectHintSub: View existing prompts from the list or add a new one.

companyDetail.noUsers: No users yet. You can add an admin when creating the company.
companyDetail.usageHint: User limit: {{usersLimit}} · AI API this month: {{apiCalls}} calls · Cache: {{cached}} · Skipped: {{skipped}}
companyDetail.planFeaturesHint: Features are edited on the Subscription Plans page. Quota limits update automatically when the plan changes.
companyDetail.noPlanFeatures: No features defined for this plan.
companyDetail.invoiceDesc: Generates a MEKANİZMA e-invoice based on the company's plan. Package details, amounts, subscription dates and add-ons are included in the downloadable PDF.
companyDetail.setupFeeHint: One-time fee for this invoice only. Leave empty to omit.
